zh.Sharpenhoe, Streatley with Sharpenhoe, B: 英國貝德福爾斯特亞特利 煙雨 沙沙
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Norton於1415年出生在英國布里斯托時，他的父親William Norton32歲，母親Elizabeth Hussey30歲。他於1434年與Elizabeth Merry在英國英格蘭布里斯托結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1489年12月4日在他的家鄉享年74歲。

nameMeanings.name: Norton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places so called, from Old English north ‘north’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. In some cases it is a variant of Norrington .
Irish: altered form of   Naughton  , assimilated to the English name (see 1 above).
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of some similar (like-sounding) original Ashkenazic surname.

variants.name: Norrington
meanings: (southeastern): from Norringtonend in Redbourn (Hertforshire), Northingtown Farm in Grimley (Worcestershire), or Norrington in Alvediston (Wiltshire). All three names are from Old English north in tūne ‘to the north of the village’.
possibly a variant of Northampton, a habitational name from the city of this name, which was named with Old English north ‘north’ + hām + tūn ‘homestead, home farm’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Norton was born in 1415, in Bristol, England, his father, William Norton, was 32 and his mother, Elizabeth Hussey, was 30. He married Elizabeth Merry in 1434, in Bristol, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 4 December 1489, in his hometown, at the age of 74.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Norton родился в 1415 г. в местности бристол, Англия, его отцу по имени William Norton было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Hussey, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Merry в 1434 г. в местности бристол, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 4 декабря 1489 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 74 лет.
